arts.ttl: Blackburn vs Wolves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Blackburn's injury woes have played a considerable role in their recent struggles, and Eustace is unlikely to welcome back many of his current absentees for Sunday's FA Cup tie. These two may well encounter one another in the second tier next season, but Wolves did secure a huge win at Molineux last weekend as they beat West Midlands rivals Aston Villa 2-0.

arts.ttl: How to watch Blackburn vs Wolves
arts.sum: Blackburn vs Wolves kicks off at 12.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 12pm. Live text coverage of Blackburn vs Wolves is also being provided on Sunday lunchtime as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Cunha BOMB, GAME OVER for Man Utd, Nkunku SURPRISE
arts.sum: Romano confirmed the interest of Arsenal, Nottingham Forest, Chelsea and Manchester United in Cunha for the winter transfer window, and says these clubs have a chance to sign him again in the summer. Matheus Cunha may have signed a new contract with Wolverhampton Wanderers, but that doesn’t mean he will remain with the Molineux club beyond the summer, with Romano announcing that the Brazil international has a release clause that makes him a viable target.
